description_long: This chaise features a modern, open-frame design with a black metal structure forming the base, legs, and a distinctive curved backrest with horizontal slats. The seat is generously padded with a thick, blue cushion that appears soft and plush, while a large, quilted peach-colored cushion serves as the backrest, providing both comfort and a pop of color. The armrests are integrated into the frame, curving upward and outward from the seat, matching the backrest's flowing lines. The legs are straight and slightly tapered, giving the piece a stable yet elegant stance. The upholstery on both cushions is smooth and slightly glossy, with visible tufting on the back cushion for added texture. This chaise would be well-suited for urban parks, patios, or stylish public seating areas.
description: A modern chaise with a black metal frame, blue seat cushion, and a large peach quilted back cushion, featuring curved armrests and a sleek, open-back design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue seat cushion, peach quilted back cushion, and the open, curved black frame with integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the horizontal slats of the black metal backrest and the full size of the peach cushion.
description_view_2: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the curvature of the frame and the thickness of both cushions.
description_view_3: Front-side view focusing on the plushness of the seat and back cushions and the open, airy design of the frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently curved, and constructed from black metal slats that create an open, airy appearance. It is complemented by a large, quilted peach cushion that adds both comfort and a touch of visual softness.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, formed by the upward and outward curve of the black metal frame, seamlessly integrated with the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slightly tapered, and made of black metal, providing a sturdy and minimalist foundation without decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The seat cushion is solid blue with a smooth, slightly glossy finish, while the back cushion is peach-colored and features a quilted, tufted pattern for added texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two loose cushions: a thick blue seat cushion covering the entire seating area and a large peach back cushion resting against the backrest, both generously sized and plush.
